channel.title: Sql on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Sql on Arrans github.io

item.title: pingcap/tidb
item.description: TiDB - the open-source, cloud-native, distributed SQL database designed for modern applications.

item.title: duckdb/duckdb
item.description: DuckDB is an analytical in-process SQL database management system

item.title: Maxteabag/sqlit
item.description: A user friendly TUI for SQL databases. Written in python. Supports SQL server, Mysql, PostreSQL, SQLite, Turso and more.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: chartdb/chartdb
item.description: Database diagrams editor that allows you to visualize and design your DB with a single query.

item.title: dolthub/go-mysql-server
item.description: A MySQL-compatible relational database with a storage agnostic query engine. Implemented in Go.

item.title: rqlite/rqlite
item.description: The lightweight, fault-tolerant database built on SQLite. Designed to keep your data highly available with minimal effort.

item.title: PRQL/prql
item.description: PRQL is a modern language for transforming data — a simple, powerful, pipelined SQL replacement

item.title: dbeaver/dbeaver
item.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

item.title: Leantime/leantime
item.description: Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

item.title: nao1215/sqly
item.description: executes SQL against CSV, TSV, LTSV, JSON, JSONL, Parquet, Microsoft Excel™ , ACH, and Fedwire files with shell.

item.title: arran4/goa4web
item.description: My everything website (server) from 2005 ported from C to GO. Ready for news, forums, link sharing, image sharing and more

item.title: nao1215/filesql
item.description: sql driver for CSV, TSV, LTSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel with gzip, bzip2, xz, zstd support.
